# Pull Request

## Change Type

- [ ] New Skill
- [ ] Bug Fix
- [ ] Content / Version Update
- [ ] Documentation Improvement
- [ ] Infrastructure (CI / Scripts / Templates)

---

## Skill Information (if applicable)

**Skill path**: `skills/XX-discipline/skill-name/`

**Discipline**: (e.g. 07-economics)

**PRD priority**: P0 / P1 / P2 / N/A

---

## Description

> Briefly describe what this PR adds or changes and why.

---

## Local Testing

- [ ] Ran `python scripts/validate_skill.py <path> --verbose` — passed
- [ ] Executed at least one complete code example from SKILL.md — success
- [ ] Checked for overlap with existing Skills

**Test environment**:
- Python version:
- OS:
- Key dependency versions:

---

## Expert Review

- [ ] I have domain expertise and can vouch for professional accuracy
- [ ] Requested expert review (tagged domain maintainer in PR)
- [ ] Added `status: awaiting-expert-review` to frontmatter

---

## Compliance

- [ ] No hardcoded API keys
- [ ] Third-party code properly attributed
- [ ] `license` field is MIT or more permissive
- [ ] No real personal data in examples

---

## Related Issue

Closes / Related: #
